case_title: ANGELO MARKOULIS VS. GUANG XIAN HOU

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARKOULIS, ANGELO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HOU, GUANG XIAN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2425 THIRD STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94107, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - COMMERCIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARKOULIS, ANGELO AS TO DEFENDANT HOU, GUANG XIAN SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, PLACED IN PICKUP BOX, AS TO DEFENDANT HOU, GUANG XIAN
AMENDED REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT HOU, GUANG XIAN
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, PLACED IN PICKUP BOX, AS TO DEFENDANT HOU, GUANG XIAN
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT HOU, GUANG XIAN
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT HOU, GUANG XIAN
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (DEFAULT ONLY) AS TO DEFENDANT HOU, GUANG XIAN
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, PLACED IN PICKUP BOX, AS TO DEFENDANT HOU, GUANG XIAN
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $203.06 FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARKOULIS, ANGELO
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARKOULIS, ANGELO SERVED OCT-30-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HOU, GUANG XIAN
